use_cases: Primary actions like form submissions and confirmations
Secondary actions in toolbars and card footers
Icon-only buttons for compact UI spaces
ai_summary: A versatile React button component with multiple size variants (tiny to large), type variants (primary, secondary, tertiary, error, warning), and shape options (square, circle, rounded). Features support for prefix/suffix icons, loading spinners, shadows, and full-width layouts. Styled with Tailwind CSS using a dark minimalist aesthetic.
